nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahab and all that he did and the ivory house which he built and all the cities which he built, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahab and all that he did, and the ivory house that he built and all the cities that he built, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

cnv.text: 亞哈其餘的事蹟，他所作的一切，他建造的象牙宮和他重建的一切城鎮，不是都記在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 亚哈其他的事，他的一切所作所为和他建造的象牙宫及各城邑，都记在以色列的列王史上。
